string.text:
The KSG-12 is a bullpup 12-gauge pump-action shotgun designed by KelTec. It has two tube magazines which the user of the gun can switch between manually, and each tube holds up to seven 12-gauge shotshells, plus the chambered shell, for a total of 15 rounds when fully loaded. It is lightweight and very useful in close-range combat.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: All Red Dot scopes for Picatinny/weaver
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: Salvo
